  "findings": [
    "Missing pipe alignment guides near expansion loops",
    "Risk of pipe buckling, squirm, or joint failure under thermal expansion"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate or depressurize the affected piping system if safe to do so",
    "Install engineered pipe alignment guides on both sides of the expansion loops in accordance with MSS SP-58 and manufacturer specifications",
    "Inspect expansion joints and loops for signs of deformation or stress damage"
  ],
  "rationale": "Expansion loops require proper alignment guides to ensure thermal expansion is directed axially into the loop. Without these guides, the piping is highly susceptible to lateral buckling, squirm, and catastrophic joint failure while in service.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58",
    "ASME B31.9",
    "Project Support Standards"
  ]
}
